overall.criticalFinding: F-15 failed: after multiple expert turns plus text and two voice interactions, the full-summary modal showed only the topic and no meaningful summary points.

taxonomy.PASS: Complete test executed; all pass criteria passed.
taxonomy.PARTIAL: Complete test executed; some product criteria passed and some demonstrably failed.
taxonomy.FAIL: Complete test executed; a required product outcome demonstrably failed.
taxonomy.UNDETERMINED: No product verdict because required user outcome could not be executed or verified.
taxonomy.BLOCKED: QA execution could not complete because a required environment or capability was unavailable.

functionalMatrix.verified: Disclaimer appeared before use; emergency/service/privacy content and consent action were visible; accept unlocked homepage.
Hot topic preserved in chat and controls became usable in 3 timed runs.
Mandarin WAV activated recording; stop produced materially correct transcript; transcript submitted successfully to expert-selection flow.
functionalMatrix.reason: All criteria verified end to end.

functionalMatrix.verified: Recommendations, scores, relevant reasons, and intact cards appeared in 3 timed runs.
Selected set changed 3 -> 2 -> 3; final set carried into chat.
Custom topic and final experts carried into usable chat.
Returned TTS MP3s were captured, non-silent, and transcribed; content and voice IDs matched visible speaker turns.
functionalMatrix.missingFailed: Actual speaker/device playback to a user was not captured; missing/cut-off playback cannot be ruled out.
functionalMatrix.reason: Environment constraint: headless Chromium is muted and host has no PulseAudio/PipeWire or /dev/snd. Returned assets are supporting evidence only.

functionalMatrix.verified: Multiple visible speakers progressed; captured non-silent TTS assets used distinct voice IDs and matching content.
functionalMatrix.missingFailed: Separate audible turns and absence of audible overlap/stall were not verified at device output.
functionalMatrix.reason: Environment constraint: actual browser/system audio output capture unavailable.

functionalMatrix.verified: Text submitted; subsequent expert response addressed half-night waking/daytime fatigue; relevant TTS asset captured.
functionalMatrix.reason: All criteria verified with visible flow and response content.

functionalMatrix.verified: Paused and resumed UI states appeared; session remained intact.
functionalMatrix.missingFailed: Actual audible speech stop/resume and no duplicated audio were not verified.
functionalMatrix.reason: Environment constraint: actual device output unavailable; UI state alone is insufficient for a product verdict.

functionalMatrix.verified: Summary opened and clearly stated conversation content was insufficient; close path worked.
Back opened confirmation; cancel retained session; confirm returned to /group.
functionalMatrix.reason: All criteria verified with Playwright plus OpenClaw browser cross-check.

functionalMatrix.verified: Recording UI activated; two separate stop actions returned materially correct Mandarin STT; expert replies addressed half-night waking; repeat interaction succeeded.
functionalMatrix.reason: All criteria verified end to end.

functionalMatrix.verified: Full-summary test executed after multiple expert turns, text interjection, and two voice interactions; modal opened and remained readable.
functionalMatrix.missingFailed: Modal contained only the topic and no meaningful conversation points.
functionalMatrix.reason: Product issue: required useful non-empty summary content was absent despite sufficient tested history.

functionalMatrix.verified: 390x844 viewport had no horizontal overflow; core controls/content remained visible and usable.
No user-visible crash, freeze, unexpected reload, or blocked core action across the completed journey.
functionalMatrix.reason: All criteria verified; engineering-only events did not cause observed user-visible failures.

performanceSummary.definition: Begin navigation -> first meaningful content visible
Begin navigation -> consent modal visible/readable/action usable
Consent accept -> topic cards and voice/text controls usable
Hot-topic click -> chat topic and controls usable
Find experts click -> recommendations, scores, reasons visible
Start discussion click -> chat topic and controls usable
Send click -> relevant expert response asset/content available
Stop click -> materially correct transcript visible
Stop click -> relevant expert response asset/content available
Summary click -> usable insufficient-content state visible
Chat ready -> first speech actually heard
performanceSummary.reason: Actual device output unavailable; returned audio assets do not prove heard playback.

performanceSummary.area: Speaker transition / pause / resume audible timing
performanceSummary.definition: Previous audible speech / pause/resume action -> actual heard output change

engineeringAppendix.fixture: 9.9s PCM s16le mono 48kHz; mean -27.7 dB; local Whisper materially matched intended sleep request.
engineeringAppendix.audioAssets: Multiple TTS MP3 response bodies captured; examples were non-silent and transcribed with matching content/visible speaker identity.
engineeringAppendix.environmentConstraint: Headless Chromium launched muted; no PulseAudio, PipeWire, or /dev/snd.
